evidence: frontend/src/components/paths/EnrollmentFloatingBar.tsx — root data-bubble-id bTItS (PATHS_FLOATING_BAR_BUBBLE_ID); fixed top strip with w-full min-w-0 fluid width (not literal 0px)
frontend/src/pages/Paths.tsx — EnrollmentFloatingBar mounted when !sessionCompletionVisible; pt-24 on main content clears floating bar
drsam-99657.bubble — bTItX FloatingGroup (IR id bTItS) child bTItd/bTItY RG with fit_width:true, min_width_css 140px
frontend/src/lib/paths/pathsEnrollmentStore.ts — PathsEnrollmentProvider fetches pathenrollment1 via fetchPathEnrollments; exposes enrollments, selectedEnrollmentId, selectEnrollment

frontend/src/components/paths/EnrollmentFloatingBar.tsx — bTItY RG maps enrollments to selectable chips; data-style-ref RepeatingGroup_list_; min-h-[56px] min-w-[140px] matches IR cell_min_height_css/min_width_css
frontend/src/components/paths/PathsGridPanel.tsx — refactored to usePathsEnrollmentStore() for ai_RNbBHYHn GetElement data parity (no direct fetch)
ir/inventory.json — bTItY parent_id bTItS; data_binding search custom.pathenrollment1 for CurrentUser

functional_audit.check: Paths page renders floating enrollment bar for authenticated user when session-completion overlay is hidden
Shared pathsEnrollmentStore loads current-user pathenrollment1 rows (table or onboarding fallback) once for bar and grid
Selecting an enrollment chip updates selectedEnrollmentId in shared store
PathsGridPanel consumes the same store enrollment list (GetElement binding parity) without duplicate fetch

ui_evidence.notes: EnrollmentFloatingBar fixed top strip; maps Bubble FG-services bTItX pointer
RG on EnrollmentFloatingBar with RepeatingGroup_list_ style; duplicate marker also on PathsGridPanel wrapper per PATHS-02 GetElement convention
FG-services ui_ref resolves to element id bTItS per inventory pointer /pages/bTHDg/elements/bTItX
bTItY RG uses bubbleStyle(RepeatingGroup_list_) matching style_ref:bTItY

critiques.finding: Two DOM nodes carry data-bubble-id='bTItY' on the same Paths page — EnrollmentFloatingBar RG and PathsGridPanel enrollment wrapper — while Bubble defines a single bTItY under bTItS.
critiques.alternative: Keep bTItY marker only on EnrollmentFloatingBar (canonical RG owner); use ai_RNbBHYHn alone on grid or a data-source attribute for GetElement parity without duplicating the bubble id.

critiques.finding: deriveListFromOnboardingData fallback omits currentSessionId/currentSessionTitle on PathEnrollmentListItem, so AC-3 session fields are empty when pathenrollment1 table is absent even if onboarding_data could carry session state.
critiques.alternative: Map onboarding path_enrollment1 session fields into currentSessionId in deriveListFromOnboardingData, or document PATHS-07 dependency on pathenrollment1 migration (PATHS-03).

critiques.finding: Bubble bTItY RG uses container_layout column with min_height_css 232px; implementation renders horizontal flex-row chips per layout_notes — intentional SPA adaptation but diverges from IR column stacking.
critiques.alternative: Switch floating bar RG to flex-col with max-h matching 232px and overflow-y-auto when pixel parity with Bubble FG-services panel matters.

critiques.finding: Empty-state copy "No enrolled paths yet" is React-authored; Bubble RG has no static empty cell text in the extracted tree.
critiques.alternative: Confirm against live Bubble or IR text_expressions; align copy if a canonical string exists.
